cafeInfo.name: Cafe Crafted
cafeInfo.introShort: Welcome to our cozy corner — where warm light, fresh flavors, and good company meet.
cafeInfo.introFull: Step into a space designed for comfort and connection. Our kitchen serves handcrafted beverages, fresh meals, and seasonal specials made with care. Whether you're here for a quick coffee or a long lunch with friends, we’re glad you scanned in.

menuItems.name: Caramel Latte
menuItems.description: Rich espresso with steamed milk and caramel drizzle.

menuItems.name: Avocado Toast
menuItems.description: Sourdough, smashed avocado, cherry tomatoes, and microgreens.

menuItems.name: Grilled Panini
menuItems.description: Mozzarella, basil pesto, and sun-dried tomato on ciabatta.

menuItems.name: Berry Smoothie Bowl
menuItems.description: Mixed berries, granola, coconut flakes, and honey.

menuItems.name: Chocolate Croissant
menuItems.description: Buttery pastry filled with dark chocolate.

menuItems.name: Iced Matcha
menuItems.description: Ceremonial grade matcha over ice with oat milk.
